titles.en: Chapter 13 – The Instigation between the animals
Chapter 13 – The Instigation between the animals

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ التَّحْرِيشِ بَيْنَ الْبَهَائِمِ فَقَالَ كُلُّهُ مَكْرُوهٌ إِلَّا الْكَلْبَ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ التَّحْرِيشِ بَيْنَ الْبَهَائِمِ فَقَالَ كُلُّهُ مَكْرُوهٌ إِلَّا الْكَلْبَ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abu Al Abbas,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the instigation between the animals, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘All of it is abhorred, except for the dog’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abu Al Abbas,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the instigation between the animals, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘All of it is abhorred, except for the dog’.

segments: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from abu al-‘Abbas who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about instigating animals against each other. He (the Imam) said, ‘All of it is detestable except dogs.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from abu al-‘Abbas who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about instigating animals against each other. He (the Imam) said, ‘All of it is detestable except dogs.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/477)
gradings.label: موثق كالصحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/477)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِي الْعَبَّاسِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( صلوات الله عليه ) قَالَ

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( صلوات الله عليه )

titles.en: Chapter 13 – The Instigation between the animals

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ التَّحْرِيشِ بَيْنَ الْبَهَائِمِ فَقَالَ أَكْرَهُ ذَلِكَ إِلَّا الْكِلَابَ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ التَّحْرِيشِ بَيْنَ الْبَهَائِمِ فَقَالَ أَكْرَهُ ذَلِكَ إِلَّا الْكِلَابَ .

segments: From him, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Aban, from Misma’a who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the instigation between the animals. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> dislike that, except for the dogs’.
en.hubeali.text:
From him, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Aban, from Misma’a who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the instigation between the animals. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> dislike that, except for the dogs’.

segments: 2. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Aban from Misma‘ who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about instigating animals against each other. He (the Imam) said, ‘I dislike it except dogs.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Aban from Misma‘ who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about instigating animals against each other. He (the Imam) said, ‘I dislike it except dogs.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/477)
gradings.label: موثق كالصحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/477)

narratorChain.raw: عَنْهُ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ أَبَانٍ عَنْ مِسْمَعٍ قَالَ
